title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
